category_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME Recipes wiki; wiki describes an app for discovering what to cook and shows recipe, cuisine, shopping list, and cooking views.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gnome-recipes; official GNOME wiki page title is Apps/Recipes.
docs_sources: Official GNOME wiki page is the best official documentation/homepage surface found for this archived app.
repo_sources: Official GNOME wiki points users to GNOME GitLab for up-to-date information; official development page/search result gives git clone for https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/recipes.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description/homepage and official GNOME wiki describe Recipes as a GNOME cooking/recipe app with shopping list and recipe views.
